name: Breaded Chicken Breasts
description: Learn how to make breaded chicken breasts in under 30 minutes. Our easy method for fried chicken cutlets makes for delicious weeknight dinners.

recipeIngredient.name: 8 thin chicken cutlets (about 1 ½ pounds total)

recipeInstructions.name: Whisk eggs and set out breading:
recipeInstructions.text: In a shallow dish, whisk eggs with teaspoon salt; let stand 5 minutes. In another shallow dish, season flour with 1/4 teaspoon salt. In a third shallow dish, season breadcrumbs with 1 teaspoon salt.

recipeInstructions.name: Prep chicken cutlets:
recipeInstructions.text: In a large cast-iron skillet or other heavy deep skillet, heat oil over medium. Meanwhile, pat chicken dry with paper towels. Coat in flour, shaking off excess. Then dip in egg (letting excess drip off). Dredge in breadcrumbs, turning twice and patting to adhere.

recipeInstructions.name: Cook chicken cutlets:
recipeInstructions.text: Increase heat to medium-high. Working in batches, add chicken to skillet; cook, gently shaking skillet occasionally, until chicken is browned, about 4 minutes.

recipeInstructions.name: Turn, cook other side, drain and season:
recipeInstructions.text: Turn with tongs; cook until browned and opaque throughout, 2 to 3 minutes more (if browning too quickly, lower heat). Drain chicken on paper towels; season with salt.
